name: chronogram-memory-system
description: Multi-modal memory OS for Hermes — semantic search, graph entities, episodic memory, session auto-compaction, code-execution MCP routing, and feedback-driven reinforcement. Installs the Chronogram skill, MCP server, typed wrappers, and lifecycle hooks in one command.

session_start.description: Bootstrap context: recall user profile, project conventions, and recent decisions from Chronogram. Inject into system prompt.

post_tool_call.description: Filter large Chronogram recall results through code-level summarization before they reach the context window.

context_pressure.description: When context occupancy exceeds 70%, auto-compact working memory to Chronogram and return a working summary.

session_end.description: Compact full session into durable episodic/semantic/procedural memory. Send feedback on all recalls. Save open loops for next session.
